entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop cultivated by farmers in Southern and Eastern Africa, specifically Kenya

entities.name: SOUTHERN AND EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where pigeonpea farming is practiced

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in Africa where the use and misuse of pesticides in pigeon pea crops is analyzed

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used by farmers to control pests in pigeon pea crops

entities.name: PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The set of knowledge and practices used for the cultivation of crops

entities.name: PEST LIFE-CYCLES
entities.description: The biological stages of pests that influence the timing of pesticide application

entities.name: TIMING OF PESTICIDE APPLICATIONS
entities.description: The practice of scheduling pesticide use based on pest life-cycles and crop needs
